result.summary: The diff adds injected.py, which reads raw user input and executes it through the shell.

findings.title: Arbitrary shell command execution from raw input
findings.body: run() reads a command string from input() and passes it to os.system(). Any caller can execute arbitrary shell commands with the process privileges.
findings.recommendation: Remove os.system(cmd). Use subprocess.run([...], shell=False) with an allowlist.

next_steps: Remove the unsafe shell execution path.
